dialogueLines.dialogueText: Do you mind? We're having a private conversation.
You beat that pig man or something? Is that supposed to be impressive?
You've finally worked your way up. I'm Mirage the Marvelous, and this is my assistant, Ace.
We're premium entertainers, the best in the town. But you can't afford our shows.
The only magic trick you'll be seeing is us making you disappear from this town. Shall we?
Seems like you had a few tricks up your own sleeve. Guess I underestimated you.
I won't make that mistake again.
Ace, were you taking notes? I say we go again.
So you beat Granny, hm? Luckily we have more than enough savings.
Yeah, she fired us. But we decided to take a break from our shows anyway.
We wanted to work more on our fighting skills. Wanna test us out?
